entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop being studied for phosphorus efficiency

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to maintain productivity in phosphorus-limited environments

entities.name: P-DEFICIENT SOILS
entities.description: Soils with low available phosphorus, creating a stress condition for crops

entities.name: P-SUFFICIENT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environments where phosphorus is available in adequate quantities

entities.name: POT EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A controlled growth study conducted in pots to evaluate genotype and treatment effects

entities.name: LYSIMETER EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A study using lysimeters to measure water and nutrient dynamics in the soil-plant system

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT
entities.description: A statistical method used to visualize genotype-by-environment interactions

entities.name: LEAF P%
entities.description: The percentage of phosphorus content in the leaves

entities.name: LEAF ACID PHOSPHATASE
entities.description: An enzyme in leaves involved in the mobilization of organic phosphorus

entities.name: ROOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the root system after moisture removal

entities.name: LEAF DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the leaf system after moisture removal

entities.name: STEM DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the stem system after moisture removal

entities.name: TOTAL TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The total amount of water lost by the plant through transpiration

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of biomass produced per unit of water transpired

entities.name: ICGV 00351
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a best performer for specific traits

entities.name: ICGS 76
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a best performer for specific traits

entities.name: ICGV 02266
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a best performer for specific traits

entities.name: ICGV 05155
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a phosphorus-efficient genotype

entities.name: ICGV 00308
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a phosphorus-efficient genotype

entities.name: ICGV 06040
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a phosphorus-efficient genotype

entities.name: ICGV 06146
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a stable pod yielder and phosphorus-efficient

entities.name: TAG 24
entities.description: A groundnut genotype identified as a best performer under both P-sufficient and deficient conditions

entities.name: STABLE POD YIELD
entities.description: The ability to maintain consistent pod production across different phosphorus levels

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: A group of plants used to identify the genetic regions associated with a trait

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL POLLUTION
entities.description: The negative impact on the environment caused by excessive phosphorus use
